scope: AUTH_COMPLEX-quarantine migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (users, groups, channels, team_device_usage_report); the full Microsoft Graph surface (mail, calendar, drives, teams messages, planner, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: Bounded connectivity/auth probe driven by base.check; not a syncable stream in its own right
/teams is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/chats is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
(Chat.Read.All-class permission, out of scope for the read-only wave1 pilot shape)
